name: Road View
tagline: Check highway conditions on your smart glasses before you head out
description: Browse and view live WSDOT highway camera feeds on your Even Realities G2 smart glasses. Navigate by highway, scroll through cameras, and view snapshots in standard or full-tiled mode.
author: Nate Almanza

permissions.name: network
permissions.desc: Fetches WSDOT highway camera metadata and live camera images from WSDOT and third-party hosts.
